name: 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐑𝐨𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐊𝐧𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭 - 𝐒𝐡𝐚𝐝𝐨𝐰 𝐂𝐫𝐲𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐥
description:
BLACK KNIFE

Hiiiii!! (Extra exclamation mark because its Sunday)

This bot is based on a very obscure character in a pretty obscure, not talked enough about indie game that is pretty underground and I dont think yall actually heard of, it is Deltarune. Now, pretty much every bot I made before was sweet ash, this one MIGHT just kill you, I mean, I got my hands broken when I was testing this bot soooo... I mean shooters shoot. The higher the stakes the bigger the prize. YES The Knight is Dess in this. Woohoo wow ya. Third Dess bot. Enough is never enough is never

. UPDATE (17.02.26): ADDED EXTRA DIALOGUE OPTION

. UPDATE (17.02.26): ADDED EXTRA DIALOGUE AGAIN

ART WAS DRAWN BY: @user823493247 (On Twitter)
